query:
SELECT
                id AS "id!",
                from_id AS "from_id!",
                label AS "label!",
                to_id AS "to_id!",
                to_label AS "to_label!",
                properties,
                created_at AS "created_at!",
                updated_at
            FROM associations
            WHERE from_id = ?
              AND label = ?
              AND ( ? IS NULL OR to_label = ? )
              AND ( ? IS NULL OR id < ? )
            ORDER BY id DESC
            LIMIT ?
